metadata.title: Product Experiences
metadata.description: Outcome-based product experiences for the Travel Accommodations Marketplace domain, covering traveler booking, partner operations, payments, and trust.

definitions.productBrick: A reusable implementation-facing building block used to realize one or more product experiences.
definitions.productCapability: A high-level, outcome-based experience that delivers customer or business value.

metadata.flowModelNote: Each experience carries only experience-specific flows. Each flow step lists the bricks and external systems used inside that experience.

capabilities.name: Discover and Compare Stays
capabilities.description: Help travelers move from broad destination intent into a high-confidence shortlist of relevant accommodations.

flows.title: Discover and Compare Stays
flows.description: From destination entry to trusted shortlist.

steps.title: Enter destination intent
keyFacts: Travelers often start with broad place and date intent, not a specific property.
Strong destination context improves both relevance and conversion.
painPoints: Weak destination context creates noisy search handoff.
Users abandon when the marketplace does not feel location-aware.

dependencies.name: Destination Discovery
dependencies.description: Destination entry, inspiration, map context, and contextual landing surfaces that move travelers from broad trip intent into accommodation search.
dependencies.how: Uses Destination Discovery to turn broad travel intent into a structured marketplace query.

steps.title: Filter and rank options
keyFacts: Ranking quality is central to perceived marketplace quality.
Search results need to reflect policy, budget, and quality expectations.
painPoints: Irrelevant ranking or poor filters lower trust quickly.
Hidden commercial logic can make partners and travelers feel the system is opaque.

dependencies.name: Search, Ranking & Filters
dependencies.description: Accommodation search, filtering, sorting, map browsing, and ranking across traveler and policy intent.
dependencies.how: Uses Search, Ranking & Filters to produce the actual shortlist and result ordering.

dependencies.name: Marketplace Intelligence
dependencies.description: Decision support and data products for ranking, pricing, promotion, quality, and marketplace economics.
dependencies.how: Uses Marketplace Intelligence to inject relevance, quality, and commercial signals into ranking.

steps.title: Inspect property confidence
keyFacts: Property-page quality often determines whether search interest turns into checkout.
Travelers need policy and review clarity, not just photos and price.
painPoints: Incomplete policy detail creates support and cancellation risk later.
Low trust in reviews or host quality suppresses conversion.

dependencies.name: Property Detail & Reviews
dependencies.description: Property page, room detail, policy presentation, review surfaces, and booking confidence content.
dependencies.how: Uses Property Detail & Reviews to provide the final trust and fit evidence before booking.

dependencies.name: Trust, Verification & Risk Controls
dependencies.description: Host verification, fraud checks, abuse prevention, incident handling, and risk scoring across bookings and reviews.
dependencies.how: Uses Trust, Verification & Risk Controls to surface marketplace trust indicators.

capabilities.name: Book and Confirm Stay
capabilities.description: Convert selected accommodation inventory into a reliable confirmed booking with clear payment and policy handling.
outcomes: Lower avoidable support and dispute cost

flows.title: Book and Confirm Stay
flows.description: Handle traveler checkout and booking-state creation.

dependencies.name: Checkout & Booking Orchestration
dependencies.description: Traveler checkout, reservation creation, policy handling, confirmation, and booking-state management.
dependencies.how: Uses Checkout & Booking Orchestration to validate policy, traveler data, and room conditions.

dependencies.name: Payments & Payouts
dependencies.description: Payment collection, guarantees, payout orchestration, refunds, disputes, and finance visibility for multiple payment models.
dependencies.how: Uses Payments & Payouts to support card handling, guarantees, and refund logic.

dependencies.name: Payment Service Providers
dependencies.description: Card and payout rails supporting traveler payments and partner remittance.
dependencies.how: Relies on external PSPs to complete financial transactions.

dependencies.name: Checkout & Booking Orchestration
dependencies.description: Traveler checkout, reservation creation, policy handling, confirmation, and booking-state management.
dependencies.how: Uses Checkout & Booking Orchestration to persist the confirmed booking.

dependencies.name: Connectivity & Partner APIs
dependencies.description: Partner connectivity, reservation sync, inventory APIs, and ecosystem integration surfaces for PMS, channel managers, and other partners.
dependencies.how: Uses Connectivity & Partner APIs to synchronize booking state to partner systems when needed.

capabilities.name: Manage Trip and Recover Issues
capabilities.description: Help travelers and support teams manage changes, disruptions, and issue recovery without losing trip confidence.

flows.title: Manage Trip and Recover Issues
flows.description: From self-service changes to support-led recovery.

dependencies.name: Trip Management & Messaging
dependencies.description: Itinerary views, pre-stay and post-booking messaging, traveler self-service, and reservation-state communication.
dependencies.how: Uses Trip Management & Messaging to show the current itinerary and what actions are possible.

dependencies.name: Customer Support & Recovery
dependencies.description: Support case management, issue triage, rebooking and recovery workflows, and exception handling across traveler and partner operations.
dependencies.how: Uses Customer Support & Recovery for exception and dispute handling.

dependencies.name: Trust, Verification & Risk Controls
dependencies.description: Host verification, fraud checks, abuse prevention, incident handling, and risk scoring across bookings and reviews.
dependencies.how: Uses Trust, Verification & Risk Controls when fraud, abuse, or safety risk is involved.

dependencies.name: Payments & Payouts
dependencies.description: Payment collection, guarantees, payout orchestration, refunds, disputes, and finance visibility for multiple payment models.
dependencies.how: Uses Payments & Payouts to complete refunds, compensation, or settlement changes.

capabilities.name: Grow Partner Visibility and Occupancy
capabilities.description: Help accommodation partners optimize content, pricing, and programs to win profitable demand.

flows.title: Grow Partner Visibility and Occupancy
flows.description: Use partner tools and marketplace insight to improve profitable demand.

dependencies.name: Partner Extranet
dependencies.description: Partner-facing control surface for listing setup, policies, reservation operations, finance visibility, and performance management.
dependencies.how: Uses Partner Extranet as the operational starting point for property and policy configuration.

dependencies.name: Inventory, Rates & Reservations
dependencies.description: Rate, availability, room, reservation, and booking-state backbone for accommodation supply.
dependencies.how: Uses Inventory, Rates & Reservations to keep the listing commercially valid and bookable.

dependencies.name: Partner Merchandising & Programs
dependencies.description: Promotions, member rates, preferred programs, merchandising choices, and partner-facing commercial optimization tools.
dependencies.how: Uses Partner Merchandising & Programs to change promotional and participation levers.

dependencies.name: Marketplace Intelligence
dependencies.description: Decision support and data products for ranking, pricing, promotion, quality, and marketplace economics.
dependencies.how: Uses Marketplace Intelligence to explain which levers are likely to improve profitable demand.

dependencies.name: Marketplace Intelligence
dependencies.description: Decision support and data products for ranking, pricing, promotion, quality, and marketplace economics.
dependencies.how: Uses Marketplace Intelligence to assess room-night quality, take-rate impact, and commercial tradeoffs.

capabilities.name: Operate Partner Reservations and Payouts
capabilities.description: Help partners keep reservation state, issue handling, reviews, and payouts running reliably.
outcomes: Higher payout confidence and reservation accuracy

dependencies.name: Inventory, Rates & Reservations
dependencies.description: Rate, availability, room, reservation, and booking-state backbone for accommodation supply.
dependencies.how: Uses Inventory, Rates & Reservations to create and maintain operational booking truth.

dependencies.name: Connectivity & Partner APIs
dependencies.description: Partner connectivity, reservation sync, inventory APIs, and ecosystem integration surfaces for PMS, channel managers, and other partners.
dependencies.how: Uses Connectivity & Partner APIs to keep partner systems synchronized.

dependencies.name: Reputation & Quality Operations
dependencies.description: Verified review handling, quality monitoring, content integrity, and partner quality operations.
dependencies.how: Uses Reputation & Quality Operations to manage review and quality consequences.

dependencies.name: Customer Support & Recovery
dependencies.description: Support case management, issue triage, rebooking and recovery workflows, and exception handling across traveler and partner operations.
dependencies.how: Uses Customer Support & Recovery when quality issues escalate beyond routine communication.

dependencies.name: Payments & Payouts
dependencies.description: Payment collection, guarantees, payout orchestration, refunds, disputes, and finance visibility for multiple payment models.
dependencies.how: Uses Payments & Payouts to close commissions, remittance, and dispute adjustments.
